data.title: Coinbase user reportedly scammed of $34 million in Bitcoin: ZachXBT
data.description:
ZachXBT said scammers have stolen over $46 million in Bitcoin and other crypto from Coinbase users in March alone.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/348702/coinbase-user-scammed-34-million-bitcoin-zachxbt?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitcoin to $110K next, Hyperliquid whale bags $6.2M ‘short’ exploit: Finance Redefined
data.description:
Bitcoin price is poised to hit $110,000 before retesting the $76,500 range, according to Arthur Hayes, pointing to easing inflationary concerns and more favorable monetary policy conditions in the US that are set to bolster risk assets, including the world’s first cryptocurrency. Still, the decentralized finance (DeFi) industry took another hit after an unknown whale exploited Hyperliquid’s algorithms to generate over $6 million in profit on a memecoin short position. Bitcoin “more likely” to hit $110,000 before $76,500 — Arthur HayesBitcoin may reach a new all-time high of $110,000 before any significant retracement, according to some market analysts who cite easing inflation and increasing global liquidity as key factors supporting a price rally. Bitcoin (BTC) has risen for two consecutive weeks, achieving a bullish weekly close just above $86,000 on March 23, TradingView data shows
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-110-k-next-hyperliquid-whale-6-2-m-exploit-finance-redefined?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Hayden Davis is still selling MELANIA to exchanges and liquidity pools
data.description:
Hayden Davis has been selling or swapping MELANIA in the past few weeks. All of the Davis wallets used for sniping meme tokens are still active, with no sanctions from exchanges.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hayden-davis-is-still-selling-melania-to-exchanges-and-liquidity-pools/

data.title: Trump Allegedly Pardons BitMEX Co-Founders: Impact and Reactions
data.description:
Arthur Hayes, Benjamin Delo, and Samuel Reed, co-founders of BitMEX, reportedly received presidential pardons from Donald Trump, affecting both legal and market dynamics in the cryptocurrency industry.
source: https://coincu.com/329225-trump-pardons-bitmex-cofounders

data.title: US Authorities Seize $201,400 Worth of USDT Held in Crypto Wallets Allegedly Intended to Support Hamas
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Justice says the financial scheme of a terrorist organization was disrupted after authorities confiscated a substantial amount of the group’s crypto funds
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/28/us-authorities-seize-201400-worth-of-usdt-held-in-crypto-wallets-allegedly-intended-to-support-hamas/

data.title: Bipartisan Crypto Bill To Fight Illegal Blockchain Activity Reintroduced in U.S. House
data.description:
A bipartisan piece of legislation aimed at combating illegal blockchain activities has been reintroduced to the U. S. House of Representatives. According to a new press release, Republican Representative Zach Nunn of Iowa and Democrat Representative Jim Himes of Connecticut have together reintroduced the Financial Technology Protection Act, a bill that aims to counter illicit digital […] The post Bipartisan Crypto Bill To Fight Illegal Blockchain Activity Reintroduced in U
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/28/bipartisan-crypto-bill-to-fight-illegal-blockchain-activity-reintroduced-in-u-s-house/

data.title: Michael Saylor predicts Bitcoin will have a $500T market cap and will 'demonetize gold'
data.description:
Saylor sees global capital shifting from traditional assets to Bitcoin as institutions explore its growing role in the evolving financial system.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/michael-saylor-predicts-bitcoin-hit-500-trillion

data.title: Is a Bitcoin Rally Coming? Exchange Net Flow Data Suggests So
data.description:
According to a CryptoQuant Quicktake post published earlier today, Bitcoin (BTC) may be on the verge of a significant price rally. Since February 6, net flow across crypto exchanges has remained negative – a historically bullish signal for the digital asset. Bitcoin To Benefit From Negative Exchange Net Flow The past 24 hours have been highly volatile for the crypto market, with liquidations exceeding $360 million, the majority involving long positions. However, despite this market pullback, on-chain data remains bullish, suggesting that concerns may be overstated
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/is-a-bitcoin-rally-coming-exchange-net-flow-data-suggests-so/
